name: suggest_sources
description: Return 3-5 authoritative sources related to the blog post topic. Each source must be a real, existing URL you found via web search.

title.description: Title of the source article or documentation page

summary.description: 1-2 sentence summary of what this source covers and why it's relevant

sources.description: 3-5 authoritative sources: official docs, well-known blog posts, or conference talks related to the post topic
